steps.title: Identify the form of the function
steps.content: The function $f(x)=4{,}800(0.80)^x$ has the exponential form $a\cdot b^x$, where $a$ is the initial value and $b$ is the decay factor. Here $x$ counts years after 2015.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 0
steps.content: At $x=0$ (the year 2015): $f(0)=4{,}800(0.80)^0=4{,}800\cdot 1=4{,}800$. So 4,800 represents the starting population in 2015.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• A) Initial population in 2015 - matches $f(0)=4{,}800$. Correct.
  • B) Population 6 years after 2015 - that would be $f(6)=4{,}800(0.80)^6\approx 1{,}258$, not 4,800.
  • C) Percent decrease each year - that comes from $1-0.80=0.20$, i.e. 20%, not 4,800.
  • D) Percent decrease every 6 years - again a percentage from the base 0.80, not 4,800.
That matches Choice A — The estimated initial moth population for this species and region in $2015$- A.
